<!-- acmp-release-intro -->
## Deployment Notes

- Use the [release checklist]({{RELEASE_CHECKLIST_URL}}) to choose the correct release asset and validate startup.
- Use the [local deployment guide]({{LOCAL_DEPLOYMENT_URL}}) for connected/local Docker deployment.
- Use the [offline deployment guide]({{OFFLINE_DEPLOYMENT_URL}}) when the target host should not need internet access.
- The `acmp-offline-bundle-<version>.tar.gz` asset contains the prebuilt image archives and offline deployment files for air-gapped setup.
